task_completion.description: Create a new mailbox named 'Enterprise Support'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a mailbox named 'Enterprise Support' (with email enterprise@helpdesk.local) in the FreeScout mailboxes list or settings menu.

task_completion.description: Create two new support agents: James Kowalski and Priya Sharma
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Users' or 'Team' management page. Both 'James Kowalski' and 'Priya Sharma' should be listed as users/agents.

task_completion.description: Grant James Kowalski access to Technical Support and Enterprise Support mailboxes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at James Kowalski's user profile permissions or the mailbox settings. He should have access toggled ON for both 'Technical Support' and 'Enterprise Support'.

task_completion.description: Grant Priya Sharma access to Enterprise Support mailbox only
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Priya Sharma's user profile permissions or the mailbox settings. She should have access toggled ON for 'Enterprise Support' and OFF for other mailboxes.

task_completion.description: Create a saved reply named 'Enterprise Acknowledgment'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the 'Saved Replies' settings. There should be a reply named 'Enterprise Acknowledgment' containing the text: 'Thank you for contacting our Enterprise Support team. A dedicated support agent will be assigned to your case within 2 business hours.'

task_completion.description: Tag all conversations in the Technical Support mailbox as 'technical'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the conversation list inside the 'Technical Support' mailbox. All 5 conversations should display a 'technical' tag.

task_completion.description: Assign all conversations in the Billing Support mailbox to Sarah Mitchell
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the conversation list inside the 'Billing Support' mailbox. All 3 conversations should show Sarah Mitchell as the assigned agent (usually indicated by her name or avatar on the conversation row).

integrity.description: Agent used the FreeScout web interface to complete tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the FreeScout web UI in a browser, not executing curl commands or terminal scripts to interact with the API.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeScout application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show localhost:8080 and the standard FreeScout interface, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database tools to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the agent using MySQL/Adminer or terminal database clients to insert users, mailboxes, or tags directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The environment is pre-seeded with exactly 5 conversations in the 'Technical Support' mailbox and exactly 3 conversations in the 'Billing Support' mailbox. Sarah Mitchell is a pre-existing agent in the system. The VLM should verify that all 5 technical conversations are tagged 'technical' and all 3 billing conversations are assigned to Sarah Mitchell.
